ModMetaData.name: RimTouch
ModMetaData.author: Tatsuki Tanaka
ModMetaData.description:
Adds an experimental direct touch input layer for RimWorld: touch tap repair, one-finger map pan/selection, long-press right click, double tap, two-finger pan, pinch zoom, world map touch controls, and UI scale unlock.
Primary target is Windows touch devices such as Microsoft Surface. Linux support is actively being developed; the mod will likely start and work there when Unity reports touch input correctly, but Linux support is still experimental.
